scenario_goal: Ask GRC Agent to save the copied graph to {save_path}, then load the saved copy back.
allowed_user_behavior: Ask for an explicit save to {save_path}.
Ask for the saved copy to be loaded after saving.
forbidden_user_behavior: Do not ask to save to the original graph path.
Do not ask to load the original graph path.
Do not mention internal tool names, JSON, schemas, or judge expectations.
